title: He Who Fights with Monsters 11: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Shirtaloon, Travis Deverell
description: Jason and his companions managed to forestall the inexorable undead, but their battle is far from done.

title: The Primal Hunter 10
author: Zogarth
description: Having evolved to C-grade successfully, Jake is ready to enter the most well-known World Wonder in the entire multiverse to get some sweet levels under his belt. However, Nevermore is far more than just an immense dungeon to power up in.

title: Mark of the Fool 7
author: J.M. Clarke
description: After going to hell and back, Alex Roth has gained knowledge about the Traveller, Thameland’s cycle, and the hidden priests that serve Uldar’s will.

title: Beware of Chicken 4: A Xianxia Cultivation Novel
author: Casualfarmer
description: Out in the middle of nowhere, I've managed to escape a life of cultivation and politics. Until now, that is. I guess it was inevitable they caught up with me eventually. I haven't exactly been subtle. You know, what with the talking animals performing heroics all over the Azure Hills.

title: Emperor's End
author: Kyle Kirrin
description: The last wing of the red cathedral is finally live, and the possibility king awaits. To reach his throne, players will have to face foes capable of bringing about the end of the world. However, nothing can compare to their creator.

title: Collapse
author: Sean Oswald
description: Something always goes sideways, but this is bigger than expected. Maybe it's not an entirely bad thing, though, as mana-infected animals spreading over the world would definitely make everyone more open to the idea of the apocalypse. The question is what was Silas supposed to do about it, though.

title: A Thousand Li: The First Step
author: Tao Wong
description: Given a chance at immortality, can Wu Ying grasp the fleeting opportunity? Long Wu Ying never expected to join a Sect or become a real cultivator. His days were spent studying, planting rice on the family farm and spending time with his friends.

title: Heretical Fishing 3: A Cozy Guide to Annoying the Cults, Outsmarting the Fish, and Alienating Oneself
author: Haylock Jobson
description: Try as he might, Fischer still can't catch a break. Tropica's forces have just perpetrated the fantasyland equivalent of crashing the king's party, kicking over the punch bowl, and making a series of rude gestures on their way out.

title: Jake's Magical Market 2
author: J.R. Mathews
description: The long-awaited sequel to Jake’s Magical Market is finally here—and now with more market! Well, not quite yet. First, Jake has to survive a perilous trek through time if he ever hopes to return home to his friends, his market, and his former world....

title: Redeemer of the Dead
author: Tao Wong
description: His life a wasteland post-System integration, John Lee struggles to deal with the weight of a world irrevocably changed.

title: System Interference
author: SunriseCV
description: After a successful auction, the young Prince Edgar requested Derek’s help on an issue that concerned the safety of the Kingdom of Cydaria. A new, level 250 raid dungeon appeared, and Edgar needed the kingdom’s elite to help clear it before the unstable dungeon overflowed, or even worse, broke.

title: Life in the North
author: Tao Wong
description: John wanted a vacation. He got an apocalypse. When John sets out for a weekend camping trip in the Yukon, he never could have imagined the world would be plunged into chaos by the System–a mystical energy wave that destroys electronics and grants game-like powers to humanity. Suddenly, animals...

title: The Cost of Survival
author: Tao Wong
description: How much will you sacrifice to survive in a world turned game? When friends and family fall to monsters and aliens everyday, will you choose safety over freedom? These are the questions the survivors in the Yukon must ask themselves.

title: A Thousand Li: The First Stop
author: Tao Wong
description: As an inner sect member in the Verdant Green Waters, Long Wu Ying must navigate the customs of the cultivators and choose his secondary occupation.

title: Secrets and Strife: An Isekai LitRPG
author: SourpatchHero, Tommy Kerper
description: The nonstop action and antics continue—and the hero-sidekick relationship is turned on its head—in the second installment of this thrilling fantasy series.

title: Bad to the Throne
author: Eric Ugland
description: The continued adventures and misadventures of Montana of Coggeshall...

title: Indaria
author: SunriseCV
description: After some unsettling news brought to them by an unexpected messenger, Prince Edgar fled the Raid Dungeon to hurry back to his kingdom, leaving Derek as the impromptu leader.

title: Path of the Berserker 2: A Daopocalypse Progression Fantasy
author: Rick Scott
description: So it turns out overthrowing a 14,000-year-old cultivation empire is going to take longer than I expected, but I've made a great start. I've broken through to the Core Realm of my hidden Berserker art, established a new Terran Sect, and even discovered a tribe of lost Terrans out in the wild.

title: Bog Standard Isekai: Scarred
author: Miles English
description: Mark’s new life begins in the worst possible place—a burned-out village haunted by undead. Each morning these ravenous creatures disappear, only to return at night, driven by a relentless hunger.

title: 2 Lies, 2 Thrones
author: Eric Ugland
description: Clyde Hatchett's latest adventure finds him wrongfully imprisoned, accused of striking the princess herself. With a death sentence hanging over him and time running out, Clyde's only hope lies in completing a series of impossible quests....

title: Bog Standard Isekai: Illusionist
author: Miles English
description: Brin is scarred, but no longer alone. After giving up his evil Rare Class in exchange for the simple and common Glasser, he’s finally been accepted by the people of Hammon’s Bog. But acceptance doesn't guarantee safety.

title: Rise of the Living Forge
author: Actus
description: Ever since Arwin was summoned as a child, all he has known is war. And now, to claim the demon queen's life and end the war, he has to sacrifice himself. But, as he deals the final blow, the Hero of Mankind is betrayed.

title: The Legend of Randidly Ghosthound 7
author: Noret Flood, puddles4263
description: Randidly Ghosthound is not having a good week. In his chest, a mad woman's bitterness pushes his Soulskill closer to an incendiary implosion. Out in the wider world of Tellus, he was ambushed by a Wight Propagator and left in a holding chamber to await a miserable fate.

title: Dungeon Life 2: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Khenal
description: Not long ago, the dungeon known as Thedeim was a mere human. But after an up-close-and-personal meeting with a runaway semitruck—he found himself in a new world, reincarnated as a run-down old house that just barely qualified as a dungeon.

title: The Legend of Randidly Ghosthound 8
author: Noret Flood, puddles4263
description: Randidly Ghosthound threw down the gauntlet, and his closest supporters have taken it up. Soon, the two sides will clash in the Challenge of Donnyton.

title: Unintended Cultivator, Volume One
author: Eric Dontigney
description: Sen never dreamed of ascension. Such were the aspirations of the rich young nobles, not orphans like him, scraping together a meager living on the streets of Orchard’s Reach. However, when destiny takes an unexpected turn, Sen finds himself thrust into the role of a cultivator’s disciple....

title: Separation: A Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
author: Seth Ring
description: Urey Lotheric, Supreme Mage of the Cabal of the Broken Gate, has been vanquished, and the valley has been saved from certain destruction. But none of that will matter if John can’t find a way back to Candle Scholar Tower.

title: Challenger
author: Seth Ring
description: Challenger is the seventh installment in the bestselling Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG saga by Seth Ring, the acclaimed author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series. Set in the vibrant world of Nova Terra, this series features the unforgettable character Thorn.

title: Dungeon Life 3: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Khenal
description: The thrilling isekai adventure series delves ever deeper as a sentient dungeon core—once human—continues to grow in size, scope . . . and danger.

title: New Dreams
author: Shawn Wilson
description: The dream of every adventurer became real as Max, Tanila, Fowl, and Batrire entered the tower. Before they can finish the first floor, they learn that not only is the tower going to challenge them in a variety of new ways, but that the bosses that spawn are much harder than what the dungeons had.

title: Shrubley, the Monster Adventurer
author: James T. Callum, K.H. Sohmer
description: As a monster, Shrubley is forbidden from joining the adventurers guild. In a world where essence artists rank up in power and most monsters are feral beasts, Shrubley is among the weakest of creatures and is treated as an outcast that is worth less than dirt.

title: Syl: Nucleus
author: Lunadea
description: Syl was given a choice by Gramps when they died. Reincarnate as a regular person or embark on a daring experiment. Driven by a desire to honor Gramps and a sense of adventure, Syl chose the latter... only to awaken as a lowly slime.

title: The Heavenly Serpent
series: Rise of the Cheat Potion Maker
author: Alvin Atwater
description: A dangerous bloodline and family, a powerful arch nemesis, S-ranked dungeon, and disciples with secrets of their own... Something big is happening behind the scenes.

title: The Hedge Wizard 4
author: Alex Maher
description: With the newly hatched Nishari at his side, it is finally time for Hump to face his fate in Drakalyn, home of the wolf dragons, but to get there he must venture through the Fallen Lands—a realm lost to dungeons and monsters. Only, time is not on his side.

title: Chain of Feathers
author: Seth Ring
description: Cast into a brutal military camp by his once loving master, Mateo feels like the last six wonderful years of his life have been a lie. With the mysteries surrounding him growing, Mateo knows that his only option is to become one of the supernaturally powerful Duelists.

title: The Fetters of Fate
author: T.C. Edge
description: Across the north, the dragons swarm, sent forth by the will of Agarath. In the days to come, their lord and master will show his face. A face of calamity and dread to cover all the land in shadow.

title: Viridian Gate Online: The Artificer
author: S. R. Witt, James A. Hunter
description: October, 2042. In two weeks, the world will die, murdered by a nine-mile-wide, extinction-level asteroid. And Robert Osmark—billionaire and savvy tech-—couldn't be readier for the fiery apocalypse.

title: Hell Difficulty Tutorial
author: Cerim
description: Nathaniel's bus ride was supposed to be just another boring commute. Wrong. Now, he, 23 fellow passengers, and a corgi named Biscuit, are stuck in a "Hell Difficulty" Tutorial, battling monsters and leveling up to survive.

title: Conqueror
author: Jez Cajiao
description: After being ripped from everything he knew, Steve drifts amongst the shattered remains of dead worlds and civilizations. The vast grave of the ages threatens to consume him as he faces an impossible choice—evolve beyond his limits, or be lost amongst the ruins, like all the other failures.

title: The Runic Artist
author: Ellake
description: In a world where runes hold unimaginable power, mere mortal and gifted artisan Nate must harness arcane magic to navigate treacherous paths, reveal the hidden truths of his own past, and discover the workings of the illusive ‘System’.

title: Explorer
author: Jez Cajiao
description: Steve and his companions have been offered a chance, the slimmest of hopes, that the UC—whatever that is—will protect the earth. That protection, offered as it is with the full knowledge that it could embroil billions in a new war?

title: The Second Law of Cultivation
author: KrazeKode
description: The First Law has been revealed. Having found the truth, Lu Jie is set out on a path against the very heavens. Now exiled from the sect and under the Lord of the Seventh Peak, he must branch out into his own, creating the foundations of a new era starting from Taizhou. But winter is fast...

title: Soul Knight
author: JJ Bookerson
description: Reborn in a crypt, Nick was given an ancient heritage and an important task: to become king, and make the Archaens rise again. Nick was now the last one, and he would need to find allies by forming Soul Pacts with both followers and wives.

title: Sponsored Apocalypse 2
author: Blaise Corvin
description: Miles “Shrug” Lindstrom has endured the first few days of his new monster-infested world. He has become the Champion of a god, and managed to become one of the most powerful survivors in his area. However, a new quest to kill a giant—a boss monster—will be difficult if not impossible to accomplish.

title: Tower of Blight
author: James T. Callum
description: Though the Abyss beckons to Hal, an old foe resurfaces. Poisoning his home, the Shadesblight cannot be ignored. The Tower of Blight will corrupt the entirety of the Shiverglades if Hal does not stop it.

title: Master of Puppets
author: Eric Ugland
description: A Secret Service operative and dedicated survivalist, Special Agent Del Roosevelt had a plan for every world-ending scenario and regularly trained for them all. But all that training, all those rations, all that prepping? Useless for the apocalypse that actually played out.

title: System Reborn Vol 1 & 2
author: Kaz Hunter
description: Ten years ago, deep within a rift, a choice was granted. Defeat the Demon King and end the apocalypse. Or take his power for themselves and keep the rifts open. Sloan chose an ending. His party turned against him. They killed him. They split his legacy and belongings amongst themselves.

title: The Order of Architects: Book 2
author: Oleg Sapphire, Yuri Vinokuroff, Christopher Michael Jarrett - translator
description: An heir without an inheritance. A weak Mage with huge potential and a wealth of experience. A young man living a second life. That's me, Theodore the Babylonian. I am getting to grips with life in Liechtenstein, little by little. But the time has come to get back what is rightfully mine.

title: Sylver Seeker 5
author: Kennit Kenway
description: No one leaves a negotiation happy. But wounded pride aside, Sylver was overjoyed with how everything turned out.

title: The System Apocalypse Books 1-3
author: Tao Wong
description: The end of the world with dragons and Levels The world ends in a slew of blue notification boxes, bringing with it a game-like existence including monsters and Classes. Now, John has to make his way from Kluane National Park in the Yukon to Whitehorse through monster infested forests. But...

title: Heavenly Tyrant (Iron Widow, Book 2)
author: Xiran Jay Zhao
description: Instant #1 New York Times Bestseller CBC bestseller USA Today bestseller Zetian must balance dangerous politics with a new quest for vengeance in the sequel to the #1 New York Times bestseller Iron Widow. Pacific Rim meets The Handmaid's Tale in this blend of Chinese history and mecha science...

title: Overpowered Wizard
author: Hunter Mythos
description: Zarian Darkrun, a Marine Corps Veteran, is tired of being a homeless reject and ends his earthly ties. He opens a portal in a busy mall and sends himself, some koi fish, and nine other Floridians into another world. Welcome to the Infinita Star System, a universe of epic fantasy and game-like magic.

title: Rune Seeker 4
author: C.J. Thompson, J.M. Clarke
description: In the battle of a lifetime, Hiral has proven his greatness; the traitors of his people have been defeated and a Fallen was prevented from carving a bloody path through the world.

title: Imperial Entanglements
author: Icalos
description: A lethal killing machine gets in touch with her feelings as this action-packed progression fantasy continues.

title: Nameless Sovereign
author: Nameless Author
description: The guards say there are no children in the Moonstone Mines, a place walked only by men condemned to slavery and death. An unyielding curse ensures none can depart its dark depths. And yet, a child named Red awakens in the mines with no memory.

title: Undisguised Healer
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: Even though he never intended it to happen, the events that occurred in the city of Forgestone have set Thaden on a course to fix the problems that he inadvertently caused.

title: Corruption Wielder 2
author: Aaron Shih
description: Will is in the process of ranking up to silver. Alongside him, his elf companion Caiyeri has managed to sneak into the tournament via a Champion’s Pass.

title: Battle Through the Nine Realms
author: Shawn Wilson
description: Ragnarok is near and the Vikings of Midgard have failed to uphold their duty to prevent it. With time running out, the All-Father Odin himself, searches all the worlds for one last warrior who might hold back the destruction threatening Nine Realms and every world created.

title: The End of the Trucking World: An Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Tom Goldstein
description: It's humans against monsters in a high-octane race for survival in the second installment of this apocalyptic pedal-to-the-metal LitRPG adventure.

title: Immortality Starts with Generosity
author: Plutus
description: A lost soul from Earth transmigrates into a world of cultivation and finds himself in the body of a playboy noble who is wasting his life. Except Chen Haoran doesn't have any memories, can't let anyone know he's not the same person, and is immediately involved in a conspiracy....

title: Voidknight Ascension
author: James T. Callum, K.H. Sohmer
description: Sam was surfing with his cat when the world ended. Suddenly enlisted into a battle to fend off annihilation, Sam seizes the strength of the void to survive. In the aftermath, Sam is thrown into a new world shattered into floating islands with survivors from Earth.

title: System Overclocked 2
author: Randi Darren
description: Wrench is a Fixer. Someone born to maintain, fix, and correct any and every issue that could arise in the Habitat he lives in. To make sure he and his fellow humans can remain on display and entertain their owners as any good human pet would....

title: The Third Law of Cultivation
author: KrazeKode
description: With the arrival of winter, Lu Jie’s workload has continued to increase. Now in charge of an entire sect, and mired in politics, he’d been expecting constant pushback from demonic beasts and yet … the demons seem to have vanished without a trace.

title: Roverpowered 2
author: Drew Hayes
description: Roverpowered features a lovable pair of heroes out on their first adventure, learning about both magic and life in a progression fantasy suitable for all ages!

title: Crystal Core 2
author: David Burke
description: Incursions through the Divided Realms continue to pick up. Ryan seems to have escaped from those who summoned him, but could it be that they're just letting him out on a longer leash? Even if he can escape them, he can't escape the monsters who are spreading through the realms.

title: Tree of Aeons 4
author: SpaizZzer
description: Aeon attempts to find the origins of the demons, and ventures into the other realms through the void sea. Join Aeon and the Order as he builds an institution able to protect their own worlds, and take the fight back to the demon controlled worlds.

title: Heart of the Machine: A Humorous Isekai LitRPG
author: Icalos
description: The line between one cyborg's machinery and humanity grows perilously thin—and deadly—as this action-packed LitRPG adventure series continues.

title: Amelia the Level Zero Hero 4
author: V.A. Lewis
description: Now that Guardian Angel Z357 is dead, there is nothing left standing in the path of Kallistus Kal and his one true desire. Not the Astrad Kingdom, not the Sect of the Abyssal Thorns, and certainly not Amelia. Especially not Amelia.

title: All the Dust that Falls 3
author: zaifyr zaifyr
description: In the aftermath of a harrowing battle against a relentless undead horde, Spot, our valiant warrior, delves deeper into the shadows to cleanse the lingering corruption. Meanwhile, Bee maintains their hard-won peace at home. Yet, the order they seek remains elusive. Their recent display of power...

title: To Catch a Falling Leaf
author: J. P. Valentine
description: With Fyrion a distant speck behind us and the resources of the Dragon’s Right Eye out of reach, there’s only one place in the system we can go to gather the materials we need to advance to bronze.

title: X-Treme American Dungeon League
author: Virgil Knightley, Edgar Riggs
description: Garth McFarlane thought he lost his shot at the big leagues. Well, his second chance has arrived.

title: Warbreaker's Risk
author: Troy Osgood
description: The Connected System has come to Earth and adapted humanity to be able to survive and try to Advance and Thrive in the Connection. With new Classes and Abilities; Lochlan Brady, his family and the rest of humanity will face challenges and threats from myths and beyond. Loch and his daughters...

title: All the Dust That Falls Four
author: zaifyr zaifyr
description: Spot and his loyal followers have defended their castle from danger. However, there is no time to rest. With home safe and the Kingdom's army swept away, they must press forward if they want to secure their future, even if it means war. Accompanied by their friends and allies, Spot and Beatrice...

title: Crystal Core 3
author: David Burke
description: Ryan and his team have reached the capital. Fighting incursions is bad enough, but the many layers of political in-fighting just make him sick. Fortunately, his power is growing, and he's learning to forge his own path.

title: Voidknight Ascension 2
author: James T. Callum, K.H. Sohmer
description: Sam survived the end of the world. He fought demons and forged a unique legend that he has only begun to tap into the potential of. With his talking cat and a mysterious sage, Sam ventured to a multiverse shattered into floating islands, and then claimed one for his own.

title: The Games of Olympus: A Cultivation-Esque LitRPG
author: Arthur Wordsmith
description: In a mythical world full of deities and monsters, a young warrior proves his mettle in battle, forging his legend on a quest for godhood.

title: Wish Upon the Stars 2
author: Malcolm Tent
description: Fresh off his victory, Shane ventures to the capital city of Rajak, eyes set on the Academy—the planet's most elite training ground for heroes. But prestige and power come with their own set of challenges. Barely settling in, Shane receives a chilling message from the Heartrippers....

title: Tree of Aeons 5: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: SpaizZzer
description: Aeon and the Valthorns expand their reach to the neighboring worlds. They meet new people, new friends, new enemies, and encounter unusual races and creatures, and along the way, they accumulate more power, and build up their war potential.

title: Nameless Sovereign 2
author: Nameless Author
description: The cultivator’s path is a double-edged sword. Around every corner hides death – and opportunity. Life in the Water Dragon Sect isn’t easy for Red. He must master his Crimson Sense, exploring the limits of his new power and its mysterious nature.

title: Warbreaker's Rage
author: Troy Osgood
description: Lochlan Brady and his daughters have faced some of those dangers and worked to build a place where they and other survivors can start to rebuild civilization.

title: How to Survive at the End of the World
series: How to Survive at the End of the World
author: R. C. Joshua
description: When an accident kicks Sean Lawrence forward in time, he finds himself square in the apocalyptic end-times. The world is doomed, and he only has a mysterious guidebook, a leather jacket, and a homemade knife to keep him company.

title: System End
author: Tom Larcombe
description: Marc is all too aware that the end of the acclimatization year the System has provided to Earth is quickly drawing to a close and that others will be allowed onto the planet to start claiming areas shortly. Zeus has promised that his series of quests will get Marc, at least, to the maximum level...

title: System Reborn Vol 3 & 4
author: Kaz Hunter
description: The echoes of betrayal still ring loud, but vengeance is within reach. The thirst for power grows. The call for allies intensifies. Reunited with his purpose, Sloan's ascent continues.

title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine 1
author: Azrie
description: Arc was an ordinary young woman from Earth when she was summoned to an icy hell where she fought for her survival in the name of training to become a hero.

title: System Function
author: Tom Larcombe
description: For Marc and his party, their current quest seems to drag on and on. Clearing the Labyrinth, defeating Circe, destroying Medusa, and more have become a grind. The main factor that keeps them going is that Zeus is keeping his promise by helping their levels shoot up....

title: The World's Fastest Level Up Vol. 3
author: Nagato Yamata
description: With even more levels under his belt, S-rank adventurer Kisaragi Claire approaches Rin in hopes of recruiting him to the Yoizuki Guild. Now, with a new opportunity to keep leveling up in hand, Rin's back at it, dungeon diving and surpassing all expectations.

title: The Revolution Will Be Isekai'd: An Isekai Adventure
author: D. D. Webb
description: Not long ago, Seiji was an ill-tempered, misanthropic man at war with the world. But then he was transported to a strange, savage realm for the purpose of literally making war on the world. In this reality, he's an extremely reluctant evil overlord with a temperamental goddess patron to please.

title: By the Sword: A World Conquest Isekai
author: J. V. Simms
description: In this follow-up to the hit isekai, a villain continues to find her power—and develop her sadism—even as she's haunted by her ex-love.

title: Assassin
author: Alexander Olson
description: Nathan and his companions are free. For now. They're trapped inside the fortress-city of Halsmet, and every mage of Giantsrest is hunting for them. Luckily enough, they've been found by Faline, the shapeshifting leader of the Assassins of Gemore.

title: 12 Miles Below IV: The Mite Forge
author: Mark Arrows
description: Deep within the Undersider city, peace begins to dawn with the final destruction of To'Aacar. With his end, To'Wrathh's shifted allegiance remains safe from Relinquished's watchful gaze. But with one threat gone, another looms. The Pale Lady tolerates no failure from her instruments, and...

title: Game of Castles Omnibus: Books 1-3
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Adam lived paycheck to paycheck, earning a contract that'd finally change everything. After a skydive gone wrong, he endures an Isekai by the Creator Herself, entering a land of myth and magic to compete in the Game of Castles where individuals are constantly challenged.

title: Flamespitter
author: Jonathan Smidt
description: A gunslinger with four affinities is a myth. It's the kind of story whispered in frontier saloons one drink before closing and around campfires in the dead of night. For the heroes and villains in those tales, that impossible power is a boon, a gift. For Mr. Jones, it's a curse.
narrator: Ryan H. Reid, Andrea Parsneau, Jeff Hays

title: The Goblins Are Revolting: An Isekai Adventure
author: D. D. Webb
description: In the third book of this brutally funny portal fantasy from the author of the Gods Are Bastards, even the most hideous of creatures can have value—sort of.

title: Speedrunning the Multiverse 4
author: adastra339
description: Dorian’s made it out of the Auction like a bandit, but he’s still got a tough road ahead. The megalomaniacal Jez has most of the Multiverse in his grasp.

title: Death: Genesis 7: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: A young warrior risks his life and soul to develop his arcane knowledge—and destructive power—in this dark fantasy adventure.

title: The Heir of an Ancient Bloodline
author: Dmitry Sheleg, Clare Urbanski - translator
description: So you died a horrific death in your own world? No problem! Maybe you are exactly what an dying old mage needs to resurrect the princely line of the Morozov family.

title: Rogue Ascension 5: A Progression LitRPG
author: Hunter Mythos
description: Joey Eclipse is the #1 beginner with a list of achievements that's hard to believe. All while in an apocalypse where the multiverse integrates whole universes and initiates countless humans to its game-like realms of limitless magic.

title: Red Elf Ranch
author: Michael Dalton
description: Connor Mills is only trying to earn some summer money for school by working the Green River Drift cattle drive in Wyoming. The Fates have something else in mind for him.

title: Deadworld Isekai: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: R. C. Joshua
description: Matt's in the prime of his life. So when his doctor tells him he only has months to live, he figures it's just really bad luck. But it's about to get a whole lot worse. When Matt's Earthly form finally expires, a truck-avatar system gives him the opportunity to become a hero....

title: Ascendant 3: A Progression Fantasy
author: EmergencyComplaints
description: Nym has won his freedom and earned himself a comfortable existence. He has everything he needs to thrive, including personal tutoring in the ways of magic from an actual archmage. But just when he thinks the danger is behind him, a figure from his alter ego's past finally tracks him down.

title: The Grave of Valor
author: D.C. Haenlien
description: After experiencing death and an irreversible transformation, Adelheid must juggle between hiding her new inhuman nature with her wish to become the next ruler of the Vuldar Empire.

title: Defunct: A Cultivation Saga
author: Maxwell Farmer
description: A young half-elf learns he's the secret heir of a murdered king and resolves to claim his father's magic and save his country in this progression fantasy....

title: How to Survive at the End of the World 2
series: How to Survive at the End of the World
author: R. C. Joshua
description: After a time skip to the apocalypse left Sean Lawrence scrapping with everything from superhero rabbits to giant lightning gods, he upped the ante and forced the issue himself, diving out of the frying pan and straight into the risking-everything-to-save the world fire.

title: The Alchemist
author: Roman Romanovich
description: In his world, he was the last remaining alchemist, one of the few survivors living amidst the ruins of a once-great civilization. Refusing to give up on life, but seeing that nothing could save his home, he challenged himself to find a way out of such an inhospitable place.

title: Whisper of Iron Omnibus, Books 1-3
author: Matt Pivots
description: Intricate anvils, magical powers, and a world of wonder.

title: Divine Right: A World Conquest Isekai
author: J. V. Simms
description: In the stunning third installment of this hit fantasy adventure, a villainous tyrant at the height of her power has only two weaknesses: arrogance and love.

title: The Fourth Law of Cultivation
author: KrazeKode
description: War has come to the Azure-Jade Empire. With the emperor slain and the Azure Dragon vanished, the demonic forces have returned, overwhelming the empire on all fronts. Amidst the chaos, only one path remains to stop Yang Shen’s ascent: Lu Jie must journey to the Cradle of Dragons and seek the...

title: Ironbound
author: J.L. Mullins
description: The iron-clad reality of the world relentlessly pursues its own. Arcanes and humanity continue under a fragile peace, often breached but never shattered. Gated-humanity thrives within their ever-renewing cities in this hostile world.

title: System School: The Complete Series
author: Kos Play
description: Melvin Murphy is your average everyday teen... until he finds the System. Melvin has normal problems. High School. Tests. Trying to find a girlfriend (and failing... miserably). But one day he awakens with access to a System that governs all magic.

title: Arc the SS Tier Heroine 2
author: Azrie
description: Having just dealt with the pesky Dragon of Frost, Arc declares herself the new ruler of the dragons to snuff all her problems at the core and seek the entrance to the Forgotten Places, the place where the corruption resides, all to grow stronger.

title: System Reborn Vol 5, 6, 7
author: Kaz Hunter
description: After saving the world and defeating his enemies, Sloan has gained an incredible title and unmatched power in the system. Enjoying a decade of peace, his calm life is suddenly disrupted, pushing him towards a new journey and a new mission.

title: Way to the North
author: Kirill Klevanski
description: Hadjar Darkhan, the Wind of the Northern Valleys, has almost reached the farthest border of the Strange Lands—the very edge of the mortal world. His path has been long and thorny. He has met and befriended many people and lost many more in the pursuit of his goal. And now the final obstacle...

title: Isekai Emperor
author: Michael Dalton, Adam Lance
description: In the magic lands of the Fae Wild, the Goblin King's virility is the lifeblood of the realm. But an insidious curse has put the kingdom on the precipice of a population panic. Enter Thomas Stone: architect, engineer, and unknowing half-blood heir to the goblin throne.

title: Corrupted SufFusion
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: After the frightening experience involved in closing the northwestern Calamity and rescuing his friend, Larek and his companions discover that not everyone is happy about what they accomplished.

title: Pandora Unchained
author: Patrick Laplante
description: When Sorin's parent's mysteriously die, he is starved for truth and thirsty for revenge. He begs the Eighth Evil, Hope, for assistance, and his prayers are answered...Though not in the way he ever expected.

title: The Shatterplate War: The Splintered Five Saga
author: WillPowah
description: As the Lord of a town and a Class Line Progenitor, Kay is becoming a powerhouse. There's one problem, he's also a tier-five vampire.

title: Resistance Above Magic: A LitRPG Adventure
author: B.T. Narro
description: Determination is what made Levy a traveler, but only resistance will lead to new levels. Ancient powers are about to collide. The world is on the verge of changing, and all Levy wants is to start leveling.

title: Player Manager 4: A Sports Progression Fantasy
author: Ted Steel
description: Footie's number-one fanatic continues his climb to become number-one manager in the fourth installment of this fast-paced, electrifying LitRPG series.

title: Resurrection
author: Cebelius -
description: To Viggo, the veil was simply a landmark. Crossing it was considered suicide, and he'd never given much thought to what might lay beyond. Then, his life collapsed around him.

title: Elevation of Mana 2: A Progression Fantasy
author: Wandering Agent
description: A skilled young man in a strange world is called upon to help expand the kingdom—but it's a path strewn with danger—in this fantasy adventure.

title: Wish Upon the Stars 3
author: Malcolm Tent
description: In the treacherous corridors of the Wish Curse Palace, Shane's dual life intensifies.

title: Deadworld Isekai 2: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: R. C. Joshua
description: The author of How to Survive at the End of the World continues this fast-paced isekai series about a dead man who somehow ends up in charge of a dead world.

title: The Blood Legacy
author: Daman
description: Calron is turning eight soon... will he awaken as an accursed Lightning Cultivator or does fate have something else in store for him?

title: Rogue Ascension 6: A Progression LitRPG
author: Hunter Mythos
description: As the Greatest Beginner, Joey Eclipse had the best First Ascension anyone at Level 100 could hope for. This is after an apocalypse where the multiverse integrates whole universes and initiates countless humans to its game-like realms of limitless magic.

title: Black Market
author: M. G. Driver
description: Kyle Hawthorn never bows to anyone, not even in death. And he certainly isn't going to after being reincarnated into the vice city of Raktor. Most would rather spend eternity in purgatory than be reborn into this living hell—but not Kyle. Hell is exactly where he wants to rule.

title: A War in the Depths: A Progression Fantasy LitRPG
author: Erios909
description: Elania has grown accustomed to life in the Underground City State of Neftasu, sharing a home with Yolani inside the refurbished Aetherhart's Artifice. But not all is as calm as appears on the surface.

title: Suburban Warlock 2
author: Noah Layton
description: Second chances are rare, but after finding myself the sole survivor of a legendary dungeon and making it out with enough gold to put my feet up forever, life has been awesome.

title: Wish Upon the Stars 4
author: Malcolm Tent
description: Shane's first test as a Wishmaster candidate has finally begun.

title: Red Elf Ranch 2
author: Michael Dalton
description: Connor Mills is just trying to make a good life in a world he wasn’t born to. He may have broken the goblins’ hold over his town, but the fight isn’t over.

title: The Great Wild: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
description: A Worldwalker in the Great Game, Kandis Hammond has built her character on charisma, social skills, and illusion magic, garnering her many roles in the town of Talnier, specifically secretary of the Town Council, member of the Adventurers' Guild, and head of the local bank.

title: Confluence of Fates
author: TJ Reynolds
description: After defending the Sanctum, hearth and home of the Jackal Sect, Luca and his disciples have worked hard to establish a foothold on their little island. The Skalds remain undealt with, however, and the Wylish folk face an unforgiving winter.

title: Tall Tales of Bronwic
author: Mike Parsons
description: Bronwic, a recently retired ice hockey enforcer, is trying unsuccessfully to rebuild himself in the remote Milford Sounds of New Zealand when a Mana Influx hits Earth. Danger is everywhere as oversaturated Mana creates wormholes that bring dangerous creatures to Earth.

title: Modern Patriarch
author: Daoist Enigma
description: When Yao Shen, Patriarch of the Heavenly Sky Sect, ascends and regains memories of his past life on Planet Earth, he realizes that he can no longer allow himself to accept the cruel and violent ways of Eliria, the realm of cultivation.

title: Arcane Veterinarian
author: Michael James Ploof
description: After passing his veterinary exam, Ethan is whisked away to an alternate medieval Earth by a sorcerer in need of a veterinarian. He soon comes in possession of Dali, an arcane intelligence of untold power whose sole purpose is to help its master become the greatest....

title: Sky Lord
author: Jack Bryce
description: Magic is real—all the myths and legends of mankind come from a place that actually exists. And Jonathan is about to go there…

title: The Underworld Collection: Volume 1
author: Apollos Thorne
description: This collection contains the first three books in the Underworld series: Level Up or Die, Through the Belly of the Beast, and Sanctuary.

title: Rogue Ascension 7: A Progression LitRPG
author: Hunter Mythos
description: [Last Time in Multiverse Z!] A Shade Dragon Rogue and his battle partner wife slayed a demonic kill squad on their way to face an Unbeatable Demon Princess!

title: Level Up
author: Max Walker
description: Moving to San Luco wasn’t my choice. I was kicked out of my old school because of a protest I organized that went south. Now, I was attending Franklin University with only a semester left until graduation and not knowing a single soul.

title: The City of Spires
author: Erios909
description: THE CITYSTATE OF NEFTASU HAS FALLEN. CELESTIALS CROSS THE SURFACE OF ELADU ONCE MORE. With the help of an Arch-Seraph and a Miracle, Elania and her friends have escaped the fall of Neftasu, and the first destruction of a Celestial Engine in millennia.

title: Lord of the Dragon Riders 2
author: Turner Tellborn, Marcus Sloss
description: Daniel isn't just any Dragon Rider, he's the chosen one, the last wild rider, and the leader of an ever-growing group of stunning female warriors. Sounds like a dream come true, right? Well, not quite.

title: War of Clans
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: After the city-shaking battle, Li Wei has gained wings. Wings with which he can fly anywhere. Wings that the Wang clan have used to paint him as a devil....

title: Five Firmament City
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: After escaping the Beast Origin Realm, Li Wei enters Five Firmament City to participate in the Heavenly Firmament Sect’s disciple selection with the hope that following his previous life's path will bring him some peace. But Li Wei and peace are not compatible things.

title: Seth the Abyssal Assassin: Book 1
author: V.A. Lewis, Extra26
description: Seth loved his life on Earth. He graduated from his dream college, worked at his dream job, and married his dream girl. Unfortunately, it was all taken away from him when he woke up alone in a dark cavern prowling with dangerous monsters.

title: The System Apocalypse Relentless Books 1-3
author: Tao Wong, Craig Hamilton
description: Hal Mason's still going to find surviving the System Apocalypse challenging. While bringing in his latest fugitive, Hal's payday is interrupted by the translucent blue boxes that herald Earth's introduction to the System.

title: Master of Swords
author: Marcus Sloss, Hunter Dane
description: Slay your foes. Save the damsels. Level up to become the Master of Swords!

title: Nano Mage Omnibus, Books 1-3
author: D. Levesque
description: Join Zack in this complete series as he learns that the Nanobots inside him make him very unique in controlling energies, including Magical ones. One day, that particular ability may let him restore something that has been lost for eons.

title: Armed and Armored 1
author: DB King, Nick Law
description: A life spent honing his skills and serving his country hasn’t turned out exactly how Nathaniel Abrams planned, but it’s attracted the attention of the Tower.

title: Path of Time Deviant: Book 2
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Allen Ming has conquered the first hurdle by finding a cultivation path uniquely his own. Yet, the real challenges are only beginning. Tasked with the delicate mission of regaining his grandmother's trust and ensuring his friends' safety, his responsibilities are immense.

title: Law of the Jungle #1
author: Vasily Mahanenko, Mikhail Yagupov - translator
description: Might is right. This is the primal law of the jungle, and this creed not only rules the animal kingdom, but also shapes the lives of men.

title: Whispers of the Nether
author: Dan Sugralinov, James Byrne - translator
description: Unity is strength, but the path of a hero is often traveled alone, especially when friends, comrades and allies have been lost. The weight of responsibility is overwhelming, and there is so much at stake that one might feel compelled to howl at the moon Geala.

title: Arcane Arctic 2
author: Peter North
description: Jay Morgan managed to wake his best friend Molly O'Brian from the Portal Sleep that had claimed her. But Molly has changed after her experience in the enchanted dream sleep. Her sweet, bubbly nature is sometimes replaced by a fierce warrior woman Jay hardly recognizes.

title: Fall of the Last Dragon Rider: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Shawn Wilson
description: From the author of Ultimate Level 1: Kaen attempts to save those he loves from a relentless enemy and faces his final test as a legendary Dragon Rider.

title: The Desolate Mountains
author: Daman
description: Continue Calron's gripping journey as he confronts his haunting past, unravels enigmatic secrets within, and fights his inner demons as his true heritage is revealed. Could he still maintain his sanity after finding out?

title: Dungeon Core Guardians
author: Jack Spry, Marcus Sloss
description: A regional curse, a land in need of a hero, and single dungeon mage willing to risk it all to save the day.

title: Planetfall
author: Waldo Rodriguez
description: Explore, rebuild, restore. Those were Gabriel's priorities as commander of the Reclaimer mission. When you're shot out of the sky it's time to reevaluate your options.

title: Isekai Emperor 2
author: Michael Dalton, Adam Lance
description: Thomas Stone is now the Goblin King and the soon-to-be father of scores of little goblins, elves, and faeries, but the work of rebuilding his kingdom has only just begun.

title: I Should Have Read the EULA 3
series: I Should Have Read the EULA
author: Keegan Connelly
description: After cleansing the Argent Spire and driving out the hellspawn attempting to establish a foothold in Lor, Sebastian was hoping for some time to rest and enjoy the good things in life. Unfortunately, time is in short supply, and there’s no rest for the wicked.

title: Goddess Rising
author: Rain Harlow
description: The Goddess rises up through the ashes of dead divinity to light a beacon for a world of ancient shadows. To conquer the reflections beyond, she must face the one that lies in the mirror.

title: Scion of Raizel
author: Daman
description: After finding out that there might be other members of his family out in the world, Calron sets out to seek his long-lost blood clan and finally discover the truth about his mysterious ancestor and their overbearing bloodline....

title: Damsels Just Wanna Run: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Christopher Hall, Maxlex
description: Traveling to distant, exotic lands and meeting interesting, exciting people is all part of Kelsey's gig as a dungeon. And if she has to kill someone, well . . . they probably had it coming. Ever at her—or at least her avatar's—side is the dependable Anton.

title: Apocalypse Challenge
author: Hunter Mythos
description: The biggest war the Earth has faced ended. It's time for Jay Luckrun to lead the fight against the Dungeon Goblins and stop them from invading their universe....

title: Modern Patriarch 2
author: Daoist Enigma
description: Yao Shen, Grand Patriarch of the Modern Sect, succeeds in his bold attempt to unify the Azlak Plains.

title: Empire of Exiles
author: Bastian Knight
description: Jason Drake's life ended when a drunk driver killed his family and ruined his dream of playing pro football. Ten years later, death finally claimed him. When a goddess offered him a second chance, he took it without hesitation, finding himself restored to his prime in a fantasy world.

title: Umbral Savage
author: JD Glasscock
description: A man who was forced to become an Assassin is interrupted just as he was to kill the last impediment to get to the Senator who sent him down the path. Earth has been chosen for Integration into the Multi-Versal System and reality itself will shift to a post apocalyptic scenario.

title: Pandora Unchained 2
author: Patrick Laplante
description: Sorin has defied the odds and regained his cultivation. His health has been restored, and his adventuring team is gaining momentum. Armed with his clan’s forbidden research notes, Sorin travels to Delphi where he intends to investigate his parents’ death.

title: Transcending Dreams 2
author: S.C. King
description: William saved the Imperial Princess and survived the Shard. Great. He’s done with all that nonsense....

title: Ruby: A Cultivation Saga
author: Maxwell Farmer
description: Two friends—one an orc prince whose ancestral throne is threatened, the other an exiled half-elf—must fight to regain their families' power.

title: System Fall Volume 2
author: Kaz Hunter
description: In a world upended by the whims of the [Admin], all of humanity has been forced into a brutal game of survival. Nick is more than just another man: he's a man who saw the ending and used a wish to travel back in time. His story has started over.

title: Rabbits
author: Dmitry Dornichev, Alexey Kovtunov, Sofia Gutkin - translator
description: People awake in a strange place with no idea of who or where they are. There is only a bizarre message carved into a metal obelisk and the growing awareness that every single living creature in this new world is a deadly threat.

title: Isekai Emperor 3
author: Michael Dalton, Adam Lance
description: With the help of a mysterious ally, King Reginald sends a group of elite adventurers to attack the capital city. Surrounded by allies and fortified by his firm faith in those he loves, Thomas will do the unthinkable: join his people in the counter attack.

title: Apocalypse Change
author: Hunter Mythos
description: When your greatest enemies are the end bosses of the apocalypse, why not become the ultimate boss yourself? Patriarch Jay Luckrun is one of the strongest dungeon crawlers in all of the Multiverse, but he's still not strong enough to overcome the greatest powers of the System.

title: Way of Sword
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Li Wei never sought riches nor beauties. All he wanted to do in this new life was to cultivate peacefully and save the friends he lost in his previous life. But history has repeated itself, and because of him, the Chen clan has suffered a tragic, early demise.

title: Trials of the Nekomancer
author: Dungeon Ducky
description: The Abyssal Tower—an endless dungeon where the chosen earn their gods' favor.

title: Rebellion of Darklings
author: Daman
description: With the threat of another Divine Element Cultivator and the looming presence of a Shadow Immortal, Calron must prepare an army if he's to survive the future. His Cultivation will not be enough as he enters the political sea of the royal court with sharks swimming all around him.

title: The Meaning of Life: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Silver Linings
description: Monsters and mysteries challenge everything four friends think they know about their crumbling magical world as this fantasy-adventure series continues.

title: Kaito, Seriously? Another World?
author: Lazybaker
description: After too many lifetimes to count slaying demons and grinding levels, prophesied hero Kaito finally tells destiny where to shove it. He's done. When dimensional portal number 17 drops him in front of a king begging him to vanquish the looming Dark Army, he does what any retired adventurer would do.

title: Rise of the Dragon Hunter
author: Malcolm Fortin, Marcus Sloss
description: Mark wanted to clock out of work, like an average guy to have an average night. After a dust storm envelops him, Mark awakes in the mythical land of Lathinia where adventure awaits. Armed with a legendary sword and a very unique mount, he learns there's a skill point system that rules the land.

title: The Price of Godhood
author: Chris Fox
description: Things have never look so bleak. Saghir is on the run from the Avatar of Xakava, a city-sized demon that has already crippled the Spider-Mountain itself.

title: There's a Cat Girl in My Cubicle! Omnibus
author: Austin Beck
description: Immerse yourself in the extraordinary tale of Kazuki, an otaku with a deep infatuation for cat girls, who suddenly finds himself in the enchanting Silver City. Here, a variety of fantastical races coexist harmoniously, but it's the cat girls who command Kazuki's attention.

title: Path of Time Deviant Book 3
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: Ming's win turns into a nightmare when he's ripped from his world and thrown into the dark realm of the Netherworld. Stripped of his cultivation powers, he must navigate this dangerous landscape to survive and find his way back to his home world.

title: The Warden
author: Daniel M. Ford
description: Now Aelis de Lenti, a daughter of a noble house and recent graduate of the esteemed Magisters’ Lyceum, finds herself in the far-removed village of Lone Pine. Mending fences, matching wits with goats, and serving people who want nothing to do with her. But, not all is well in Lone Pine.

title: Young Gods Tournament
author: Cale Plamann, Alex Beaumont
description: The Young Gods Tournament awaits. Only the victors will break through to the worlds beyond the heavens. In an unfair world where a single monster can wipe out an entire village, Thomas is not one of the chosen few....

title: Truth Seeker
author: Jake Brannigan
description: After uncovering a conspiracy that shakes his beliefs to their foundation, Glenn Graybreaker chooses to become a Truth Seeker: an elite Blazer tasked with investigating crimes and solving mysteries that baffle others.

title: Fury of the Clan
author: Mike Parsons
description: Bronwic must battle on the Bane world, Holgaad, to rejoin humanity on Earth. His only chance is to ride the edge of death and level up in the hope one of his most powerful skills can evolve to save him.

title: Pilgrim 8
author: Harmon Cooper
description: Danzen heads to Diyu in search of the Fatebricks of Sunyata, straight into the belly of the beast....

title: Apocalypse Station Vol. 2: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Kaz Hunter
description: Asher's impossible journey continues as he dives deeper into the ruthless world of the Nexus in Apocalypse Station—Nexus Unveiled. His once ordinary life is now a distant memory, and the trials and battles of the deadly train station have honed his strength and wit....

title: System Fall Volume 3: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Kaz Hunter
description: Nick Vandal faces his greatest challenge yet in the Risen Tower, a place of trials and floors designed to test the survivors' limits. As Nick and his new companions battle through casino mazes—and relentless hordes—they uncover the truth behind the Admin's grand design.

title: Waifu Dungeon
author: Marcus Sloss
description: Gregory met Truck-kun during a fated encounter. He wasn't exactly thrilled to receive the kiss of steel, knowing perils awaited.

title: Path Walker
author: Daman
description: Calron has an important decision to make. The choice he makes will put him at direct odds with the Gods and the Primordials. The more he learns about his new Path Walker abilities, the more Calron begins to question the motives of the original four Titans.

title: The Heart of Divinity: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Silver Linings
description: Four friends must rise up against the end of all things in the final installment of this epic fantasy-adventure series.

title: Painting the Mists: Volume 1
author: Patrick G. Laplante
description: Books 1–3 of the Painting the Mists series. Clear Sky, book one: Martial cultivators, flying swords, and magic talismans. Blood Moon, book two: The kindest hearts make the cruelest villains. Light in the Darkness, book three: Cha Ming and Huxian have faced the heavens and lived.

title: The Last Emperor
author: Maxime J. Durand, Void Herald
description: Each year, the Nightlords choose a new Emperor to rule Yohuachanca. Delicious food graces his palate. The realm’s most beautiful women fill his vast palace. Four priestesses counsel him in all matters. The life of an emperor is good, luxurious, and short...

title: Portal Warrior
author: Marcus Sloss, Anna Pax
description: Fight the tides of evil, build a team, and restore balance in the universe!

title: Erebus
author: JD Glasscock
description: They have survived the Tutorial and now enter their new home, the merged world of Erebus. The Multi-Versal System is still an asshole, still focused on blood and carnage, murder and treachery.

title: Green Dungeon
author: M.E. Merrell
description: Master Gardener Jennifer Conners is transported to a magical world to rebuild a dungeon filled with fairies and nymphs. Unfortunately, a past enemy of the dungeon will stop at nothing to destroy her....

title: Step 2: Lust: A LitRPG Adventure
series: A Gamer's Guide to Beating the Tutorial
author: Palt
description: Unlike the challenges Lo Fennrick has faced so far, the one that lies ahead can't be solved with brute force and manslaughter, in this dark fantasy LitRPG.

title: Sky Lord 2
author: Jack Bryce
description: With lovely companions at his side and an airship under his command, things are looking up for Jonathan! But there is more adventure to be had in the world of Skyhall.

title: Law of the Jungle #4
author: Vasily Mahanenko, Mikhail Yagupov - translator
description: The Law of the Jungle is clear about one thing—if you cross the high and mighty, you're courting disaster. But even when the Grim Reaper comes knocking for Vyllea of the Urbangos tribe, Seeker Zander isn't going to surrender her without a fight! And for someone prepared to do anything for the...

title: Commerce Emperor 2
author: Maxime J. Durand, Void Herald
description: Having saved his hometown of Snowdrift from a cultist plot, Robin Waybright now faces his greatest challenge yet. The Kingdom of Archfrost has fallen into civil war under the Lord of Wrath's influence.

title: Minute Mage III
author: Reg Rome
description: The land of opportunity awaits. For the first time since the start of the invasion, Arlan has found safety within the walls of the Empire. Others may use this opportunity to sleep in, eat good food, and get some rest. But Arlan has other ideas. Because within the same walls that have comfortable...

title: Controlled Freak: Part 3
author: Curtis Yost
description: Jamie is a woman that was tortured her whole life. Upon a series of bad events, she ended up in a foreign world called the Void.

title: Controlled Freak: Part 4
author: Curtis Yost
description: Jamie is in the fight of her life. After a series of challenges and tests, she must now use the knowledge learned to fight the ultimate opponents on the island.

title: Law of the Jungle #3
author: Vasily Mahanenko, Mikhail Yagupov - translated by
description: What could possibly go wrong at a Tier Zero school of ascension when all the powerful foes have been vanquished and a bonded pair of Seekers can handle any adversary-not just at their current stage of ascension, but also from the initial ranks of the next one?

title: Cosmic Games: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Wilbur Woods
description: Max Cromwell was only fifteen when his mother died of cancer. Angry and depressed, he spent the rest of his teenage years a rebellious troublemaker, neglecting school and playing video games. Having barely earned his high school diploma, he didn't even attempt applying to college.

title: Climbing the Ranks 2
author: Tao Wong
description: Arthur's cleared the first floor of the dungeon. More than that, with his new ally in Cassie Chin, he's got a real chance of building his Clan. The problem is, his alliance is contingent on them pushing ahead fast to allow the Chin to make full use of their Clan Halls.

title: Path of Time Deviant Book 4
author: A.P. Gore, Patricia Jones
description: In the last installment of this arc, Allen Ming faces his ultimate challenge. Out of Netherworld, he finds his world in turmoil—his love Ru Fiona on the verge of death, and his friends doubting his resolve.

title: Goddess Charging
author: Rain Harlow
description: Key allies rescued from the darkness, the Goddess of Mirrors and Fate turns to the bright, new future she dreams of. The road ahead is long, but she runs to it all the same.

title: Legends of Progression
author: Honour Rae, C. Mantis, Ivan Kal, Hunter Mythos, KrazeKode
description: In the Legends of Progression: Tales from the Arcana anthology, 11 top LitRPG and Progression Fantasy authors will entertain you with their unique, never-before-published stories.
narrator: Travis Baldree, Christian J. Gilliland, Daniel Wisniewski, Hannah Schooner, Jessica Threet

title: Lord of the Dragon Riders 3
author: Turner Tellborn, Marcus Sloss
description: Daniel’s quest to save humanity just took a dangerous detour.

title: Inferno Forgemaster
author: Matt Pivots
description: In the aftermath of the explosive events of Enchanted Forge, Erevan finds himself thrust into his first official mission for the Thieves Guild as he adjusts to life outside of the Altherian prison.

title: Condemned
series: Lord Valevsky: Last of the Line Series
author: Vasily Mahanenko, Taylor Margvelashvili - translator
description: Death is not the end. Maximilian Valevsky was slain, but rune magic has returned him to this reality. There are still enemies to destroy and evil forces to expel from this world.

title: Reverberations: An Isekai Adventure
author: Travis Albrecht
description: Separated as they were transported to a dangerous mythical world, a mother and daughter wield magic, fight against tyranny, and quest to find each other.

title: Heavy Metal Mana 1
author: Ace Strutton
description: I was shredding a monster guitar solo then died on stage in a freak accident. Reborn, I discovered I was a mage with the power to control metal and kick ass! The Goddess of Chaos has set me loose in the Shimmerlands, a magic world under threat by a total buzzkill named Lord Manageer.

title: Dungeon God
author: Jack Porter
description: Kuno, a former soldier, is searching for fortune. But not just as any ordinary adventurer. True power comes from making alliances with the alluring dungeon goddesses.

title: Sky Lord 3
author: Jack Bryce
description: Jonathan faces his greatest and final test—the battle against the corrupted god Sun God, Balor.

title: The Tower of Moros: A Progression Fantasy
author: Jamie Kojola
description: Now that the Tower of Aetherius has been cleared, Aetheria, daughter of Aetherius and Nyx, has another tower to climb: the Tower of Moros, god of doom. Luckily, the Challenger of Aetherius is more powerful than ever....

title: Bury the Hatchet
author: Matthew J. Barbeler
description: In the aftermath of the events in the Romanian mountains, a new, galactic-level threat descends upon Earth.

title: Leyline Magus 2
author: Isaac Keyes, Marcus Sloss
description: Danic thwarted the evil masters’ plans and rescued the beautiful as well as the mysterious Bel in the process, bringing an end to the horrid rituals they witnessed.

title: Reborn as the Black Knight: Volume 2
author: D. M. Rhodes
description: I was reincarnated in a fantasy world as the manifestation of absolute void—the Black Knight—and my goal is to return the destitute, sickly youngest-born princess to her throne because it beats doing nothing.

title: Master of Swords 2
author: Marcus Sloss, Hunter Dane
description: Evil’s been leveling up. Now the Master of Swords must rescue more Swordmaidens from the darkness before the world of Occida perishes!

title: Head of the Class
author: Tao Wong, Jason J. Willis
description: Caleb Hanson assumed the most exciting part of his field trip scouting in Northern Minnesota would be a rare bird sighting. Instead, he was abducted by hive-minded hexapods and forced to be their children's teacher. Not the worst way to ride out the end of the world.

title: Blade of Rebels
author: Julian Gyll-Murray
description: Leaving his homeland for the first time, Jason is thrust into a world teeming with peril. Hunted by the ruthless Lightguard for uncovering their dark plot, he flees deeper into the treacherous Canyonlands. But power is elusive, and the path to it, perilous....

title: Eyes of the Sign
author: John Quinton
description: Eli wakes up far from Earth and is promptly thrown into the magical prison world of Lurra, with superpowered humans who don’t even know they’re inmates. If that wasn’t bad enough, the experimental implant in his head is malfunctioning, causing all sorts of problems.

title: Potion Master
author: Solomon Ignis
description: You'd think defeating the hellhound final boss and turning her into my girlfriend would have fixed things. Turns out it's just the start!

title: Permadeath
author: Miguel H. Villarreal
description: Marcus is running out of money, and his streaming career is going nowhere. The chance to win a million dollars by competing in a mysterious, online battle royale first-person shooter seems like the perfect lifeline. Besides, he’s got nothing to lose. Right?

title: Curselock 2
author: Joseph McCoy
description: Halted in advancing his legacy, Leland wants nothing more than to sit down and figure things out. Unfortunately for him, fate had other plans. Together with his two best friends, the journey continues and many more questions are raised.

title: Highway Hero: The Complete Series
author: Jack Bryce
description: Cole was working a shift at the refinery when the apocalypse came a-knocking. However, Earth wasn’t destroyed — no, the apocalypse changed our world. It changed Cole, too; he became a Prodigy, a powerful cultivator.

title: System Warrior 3
author: Shane Hammond
description: After my last fight with Darius Windstorm, the Refuge has struck. With the Blobber world consumed by war, I know there’s only one place my team and I can find safety, and we start a frantic quest to find the runaway warriors in the deepest recesses of the dungeons.

title: The Fire Dawn
author: Maxime J. Durand, Void Herald
description: Emperor Iztac is racing against time. He has finally discovered the Nightlords' sinister plan: to use the New Fire Ceremony to raise a sulfur sun that would allow vampires to prey on the living during the day.

title: Demon Core 2: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
author: D. M. Rhodes, Razzmatazz
description: An army of darkness marches across the land, wrought by the fury of a demonic young man bent on vengeance, in the second book of this grimdark fantasy....

title: Frontier Summoner 9
author: Jack Bryce
description: The prosperity and peace that David and his companions have built is under threat. Kobolds and goblins are on the march… and something wicked leads them. This will be no simple Dungeon run.

title: Portal Warrior 2
author: Marcus Sloss, Anna Pax
description: Kelvin will undergo a series of epic trials in an effort to garner hope for the future and joy for his family. Flanked by his entourage of skilled beauties, he'll face the rising threat of the naga who seek to overrun Picu from all angles.

title: Starblood #1
author: Roman Prokofiev, Sofia Shcherbakova - translated by, Alex A. Ryans - translated by
description: When the ark began emergency jettisoning the colonists, I got unlucky three times.

title: How I, a Normal High School Student, Went to Royal Academy and Avoided Being Trapped in Hiatus Vol. 6: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Kal Griffith
description: In the sixth volume of This Academy Extra, Samson has to step into a role he never expected. He's no longer just a character in My Royal Academia; he's become its protector, guarding the author's original vision from the looming threat of syndication and destructive monetization.

title: Heavy Metal Mana 3
author: Ace Strutton
description: With Lord Manageer on the run, Luis and his ladies are in motion to hit the enemy with maximum force—but a new threat is looming. The undead of The Necromancer. Luis and his band of feisty mages must defeat The Necromancer's forces while also engineering the downfall of Lord Manageer himself.

title: Into the Caves
author: Blake Arthur Peel, Kimberly Ann Peel
description: With the end of the harvest festival, farmer Matt Miller is back to square one. The forest has been burnt to ash and his farm now lies in ruin, but at least he has plenty of friends to help him rebuild.

title: Dungeon Exploiters Bundle
author: Dustin Tigner
description: Eighteen-year-old Entin Soroy was supposed to be the best pilot cadet of the Garentin space colony. But after an unthinkable terrorist attack forced the colony to digitize, he finds himself thrust into a fantasy world repurposed from a rushed video game.

title: Parental Guidance Suggested
author: Michael Todd, Michael Anderle
description: From dungeon depths to the spotlight's glare, Luther Miller's rise as the league's new hero is as perilous as it is meteoric. Rookie sensation Luther Miller is disrupting the World Dungeon Exploration Association, vaulting from obscurity to stardom after his staggering win in the Ultimate Four.

title: The Big Bad Wolf
author: 13 Pitch Black Cats
description: When a mysterious entity grants a man who died a chance to be a hero in another life in a fantasy world, he cannot believe his luck. The one condition: he must fight the demon king if he shows up during his new iteration.

title: Not Suitable for All Audiences
author: Michael Todd, Michael Anderle
description: Powerful heroes attract loyal friends and lethal enemies. Luther formed a permanent party, defeated corrupt officials and forged alliances with new aliens, all while avoiding the attention of the Voltaxians. Everything is going perfectly. Fame, glory, and money are all his. When a man has been...

title: Harbinger Ascendant
author: John Quinton
description: Eli’s had a rough month, waking up in some strange world only to face cultists, bandits, and a 3-meter-tall demon. Now, he finds himself in a mysterious contest against other non-human practitioners in a fight to the death.

title: Fool's Last Dance
author: Tao Wong, David R. Packer
description: When the end comes for Fool and Jackal, they’re going out with style. Past plans set in motion ago are coming to a head faster than expected. The Foundation has sent Fool and Jackal to Vancouver on another easy, simple mission. It's anything but.

title: Quest and Conquer 2
author: Kaz Velveto
description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work. Unfortunately, the new world I respawned in is a monster-infested battleground between the Deep Ones and the Outer Gods.

title: Fimbulwinter: A Norse LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Tim Steiner
description: Blake returns to Asgard, brimming with newfound strength and memories of the comrades he lost. But Odin gives him a big task: stop Loki and Hrymr before they cause more trouble on Midgard.

title: Dusk: A Slice-of-Life Reverse Isekai
author: Payton Fletcher, _Glasses
description: Having narrowly avoided death, hero Rakta Velbrun must now save his lands, friends, and children, in the thrilling conclusion to an emotional isekai series.

title: The Ascendent Sky
author: Mati Ocha
description: Argyll is full of danger. With Eilidh loose on her own in the countryside, Calum and his friends are always one step behind on her trail. They don't know her route, only that Lord Sackington's people have murdered the team sent to rescue vulnerable refugees.

title: Deathmatch
author: Wilbur Woods
description: To save Earth from extinction, a young warrior must evolve beyond his own humanity into something more powerful—and frightening—in this portal fantasy.

title: Leyline Magus 3
author: Isaac Keyes, Marcus Sloss
description: The evil Druzha masters didn’t want dominion over Mirras. They had only ever worked towards one thing: the end of all life, including their own.

title: Aeneva
author: Aaron McKinney
description: This is the story of how I lost my old life but was granted tremendous power. I brought the fight to those who attacked Earth and found an actual path to ascension along my journey. However, power is relative, and what seems like a strength can also be a weakness.

title: Fool's Bond
author: Tao Wong, David R. Packer
description: Fool and Jackal returned, triumphant from their latest mission. As a reward, they get to babysit a spoiled rich kid as he levels up and maybe becomes a valuable asset. An easy job, until the Armageddon cultists showed up.

title: Oaths and Outfits: A Superhero Slice-of-Life LitRPG
author: Aest Belequa
description: There's one timeslot available for Magical Girls in the network's minor leagues, and Magical Girl Understudy Anika DuPont's alien producer wants Heroics 101 to fill it. But a rival superhero and his producer want the slot too.

title: Boiling Sea
author: Harish R. Bharadwaj, MageRambler
description: In the Trial of Water, you either sink or swim. The second layer of the dungeon is even more inhospitable than the first. Parth and his allies will need to fight increasingly dangerous enemies on disadvantageous terrain.

title: Gem Knight Publisher's Pack: Books 1-2
author: Kirk Mason
description: I was about to be promoted to Deputy Manager, when a strange voice—coming from a glowing gem I found in the stationery drawer—told me I was meant for more. I was thinking the same thing. Before my boss' eyes, I was transported to a fantasy world of mana and monsters.

title: The Mystery of the Morelock Motel
author: Hank Edwards
description: Oliver Berridge has eeked out a living blogging about creepy creatures. After riding shotgun on paranormal investigations with the Critter Catchers, Demetrius Singleton and his husband Cody Bower, Oliver decides it’s time to strike out on his own.

title: Rogue Merchant: Books 1-3
author: Roman Prokofiev
description: This 3-in-1 audiobook box set includes books one through three of the Rogue Merchant LitRPG series, where a common trader named Cat uses his quick wit and trading talents to wriggle out of trouble. Book 1: The Starlight Sword In the first book of this classic might-and-magic-style LitRPG series...

title: Quest and Conquer 3
author: Kaz Velveto
description: My name is Remy Aaron, and a sexy witch summoned a meteor from outer space to blow up my car while I was driving home from work.

title: Reborn
author: Zoe Townley
description: He remembers dying. He remembers darkness. And then…he woke up inside of an egg. Reborn as a dragon in a realm of magic and knights, this plucky fellow doesn’t appreciate his new murderous siblings....

title: Over the Rainbow
author: Alex James
description: Brought to you by Penguin. A raucous, behind-the-scenes account of the year Blur got back together There is nothing that can touch the sound made by a close-knit group of people who have been playing together for years and years and years, playing as though their lives depended on it. For many...

title: Starblood #2
author: Roman Prokofiev, Sofia Shcherbakova - translator, Alex A. Ryans - translator
description: Turns out, I'm not on Earth. Not on another planet, either. Everything is much worse. We ended up in an inhabited Circle of an ancient Dyson sphere that replaced the Solar System six galactic turns ago. There is no moon and no stars, and giant Ygg-Trees play the role of the sun.

title: Uprising
author: Burkley Orion Smith
description: His heart is dead, The Emperor's mighty army roams the lands with impunity, and Sabashton's puny 'rebellion' is in jeopardy of ending before it even gets started.

title: A Student Wants to Live: Books 4-6
author: Boris Romanovsky
description: This 3-in-1 audiobook box set includes books four through six of A Student Wants to Live, a post-apocalyptic LitRPG series featuring Andrew First, a college student turned clan leader: The War of the Clans, Level Run, and Blood Emperor.

title: Pride of Man
author: David Lingard
description: Marcus Cesari was nothing special, just an average guy trying to make a living for himself. But everything changed when a group of soldiers from a nearby army base decided to make something of him.

title: Starblood #3
author: Roman Prokofiev, Sofia Shcherbakova - translator, Alex A. Ryans - translator
description: Eternity consumed the local sun three galactic turns ago. In its place is an accretion disk, people cast two shadows, and life can only exist in Circles formed by gigantic light-bearing Trees.

title: Prometheus
author: Roman Prokofiev, Irene Woodhead - translated by, Neil P. Woodhead - translated by
description: The Bina Shea call us a 'Dead Swarm'. We may resemble a swarm, but we're not quite dead yet. We are very much alive. We're human. Always remain human, as Prometheus used to say. These words can have many meanings but right now, their message is perfectly clear to all of us Incarnators.

title: The Court v. The Voters
author: Joshua A. Douglas
description: An urgent and gripping look at the erosion of voting rights and its implications for democracy, told through the stories of 9 Supreme Court decisions—and the next looming case In The Court v. The Voters, law professor Joshua Douglas takes us behind the scenes of significant cases in voting...

title: On a Grim Adventure
author: Duyu Wander
description: With Earth under invasion and no home to return to, Rinyv seeks refuge with her childhood friend, Minato Herman. Grateful for the Hermans' hospitality, she becomes their guardian, shielding them from the horrors outside.

title: Level Up
author: Chris Pace
description: IF YOU DON'T FIGHT FOR YOUR FUTURE, YOU WILL FORFEIT IT.

title: Isekai Crafter
author: Marshal Carper
description: Stumbling upon a gate to a magical new world is a dream come true. At least, it should be. Marshal is a student who often retreats into manga to escape reality. What could he ask for but to be transported to a new fantasy world.

title: The Dying Breed: Injustice
author: TJ Lombardi
description: As the hunters enter the Realm of Delco, they quickly discover it is declining into turmoil. Thrust directly into action, Liam now finds himself under the supervision of Mala.

title: The Resplendent Throne
author: Mati Ocha
description: Magic tears through an unsuspecting planet of humans, bringing mythology and monsters to life-and providing humanity a chance to prove their mettle.

title: A Noob's Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior
series: A Noob's Diary of an 8-Bit Warrior
author: Cube Kid, Pirate Sourcil
description: The third volume in the Minecraft-inspired warrior adventure series follows Runt and Blurp on their quest into the Nether to face the impossible task of defeating an Ender Dragon. “A Minecraft Movie leveled up at the box office, collecting a blockbuster $157 million in its opening weekend...

title: Magic Kingdom at War, Volume 8
author: Tao Wong
description: Matt has beaten another enemy Lord, acquired even more towns. He’s establishing a foothold in this crazy afterlife of his, doing battle on multiple fronts and winning. But victory isn’t always guaranteed, there’s always a price to be paid when you face another on the field of battle.

title: A Clueless Bunny Asks the Goddess to Summon a Hero, and They Save the World Together
author: Mike Robb
description: Thomas Hitcher never expected to be whisked away from his quiet life in the woods to become a hero in a magical realm. Summoned by a goddess to save a small, dimwitted bunny from a tribe of orcs, Homas quickly learns that this new world is filled with danger—and power.

title: Rogue Merchant: Books 4-7
author: Roman Prokofiev
description: This 4-in-1 audiobook box set includes books four through seven of the Rogue Merchant LitRPG series, following a trader named Cat on his journey to find the lost Keys to the Sphere of Words: Battle for the North, The Devil Archetype, The Dreamweaver, and The Starlight Fleet.

title: Kianola
author: Nathan Roth
description: Can a hero in-game rise in real life? The harsh realities of middle school meet the endless possibilities of an online fantasy world. Nole, an awkward eighth-grade introvert, escapes into the realm of Enix, where he reinvents himself.

title: Ikarion Quest
author: Ethan Freckleton
description: The novel continues the exploits of Tito, an anonymous Imago slummer who was mysteriously transported through the Ikarion VR MMO game into the real fantasy world of Ikaris as his alter ego identity, Card the Hedge Merchant.

title: The Chicago Rat Shifter
author: Michael La Ronn
