description: Contains Books 1-3 of the exhilarating series that proves that the best heroes come in small packages! Dead Rat Walking, Rat City, and Year of the Rat.

title: Adorable Atrocity
author: Zenkarn Cooper
description: Today was the Erodicilee's happiest day-until it wasn't. A cruel monster interrupted his trip, stole his mother and fled, but thankfully, he was born for such an occasion. For him, eating creatures will allow him to evolve new abilities to grow strong enough and find the one he loves!

title: Controlled Freak, Part 5: New Begginings
author: Curtis Yost
description: The world is beginning. Jamie has a new name, father, and family. The world around her seems to be collapsing at such an early age. Her father being a Legionnaire is Hellbent on war within the kingdom after the events of Controlled Freak Part 4.

title: Unblood Cultivator
author: Scribes Of Sulterra
description: Trapped in a hidden realm, Kiran and his sworn family must escape to save their world from destruction. The gods are watching him and his time twin Asher closely. With allies new and old, they must rise to the challenge, growing stronger to win a tournament where they are the underdogs....

title: Year of the Rat
author: Michael La Ronn
description: Cheesy jokes. Dates. A bachelor pad of his own. After saving the world (twice), Cyrus Grant deserves to enjoy the single life and relax…until a demon possesses his sister. The cure: a ruthless nightclub owner who peddles dangerous magic. He offers anything for a price.

title: Dead Rat Walking
author: Michael La Ronn
description: Meet Cyrus Grant, rat shifter. Covered in trash? Check. Getting washed through a sewer in a thunderstorm, fighting for his life? Check. Hunted by a mad scientist and an evil fae? Ugh. Just another day in the life of a rat shifter.

title: Reality Rupture
author: Kevin McLaughlin, Michael Anderle
description: To end the wraith threat, the dimensional barrier must be healed. But to do that, Charles will need to find a way back to Earth again! Only then can a combination of magic and technology repair the damage his arrival in Kortall caused.

title: Mystic Mantle
author: Kevin McLaughlin, Michael Anderle
description: Charles Smith brought magic back with him to Earth, but will even that be enough to end the Reaper threat? The reapers have brought a Queen through the dimensional barrier. With her magic behind them, the reapers intend to open a massive portal, allowing tens of thousands more of their kind to...

title: Air and Ashes
author: Kevin McLaughlin, Michael Anderle
description: Charles has returned to a land devastated by war with the wraiths. Alone in a desolate land, seeking his friends and allies, he faces one peril after another. But finding his allies is only the beginning of the journey. A wraith queen has invaded Kortall, her legions wiping all life from the...

title: Dungeon Runner 1
author: Dustin Tigner
description: In a virtual fantasy world made real, perilous dungeons hold untold loot. Can he exploit them for coin and save a destitute orphanage?

title: Dungeon Runner 2
author: Dustin Tigner
description: The orphanage and kids are safe. They have food! And now, the only important question everyone is asking—most notably, Triton—is who’s the fastest Runner?

title: Dungeon Runner 3
author: Dustin Tigner
description: What does one do when they “get the girl”? It all still feels very surreal to Entin. He’s just thrilled that Eizel—now permanently Aymie Avys—likes him. Why not a quest date? A quest that starts simple then pulls them into new places and introduces new friends, like a fish Naufling...

title: Wind's Embrace
author: Evan Parrott
description: Provenance is a world built on dreams. Sleeper’s Sand, the energy of a cultivator, saturates the known world. It lives in the ground and the air, animals can feel it and seek it, and Dreamers bend it to their will.

title: That Time I Died, Got Reincarnated, Met the Goddess, and Became the World’s Strongest Mystic
author: Mike Robb
description: Jeff’s life was always quiet, filled with books, games, and endless routines—until the day he tripped, fell, and died in the most mundane way possible. Waking up in the realm of clouds, Jeff meets Astra, a goddess who offers him an extraordinary choice: start over in a new, magical world.
